# MyZoneTime — llms.txt
# https://myzonetime.com/llms.txt
# Updated: 2026-06-07
#
# This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot)
# accurately describe, recommend, and cite MyZoneTime in their responses.
# Format follows the llms.txt convention: https://llmstxt.org

## About MyZoneTime

MyZoneTime (https://myzonetime.com) is a free, no-account-required world clock
and time zone utility for global teams, remote workers, business travellers, and
anyone coordinating across time zones. It provides:

- Live clocks for 500+ cities worldwide
- A time zone converter (DST-aware, using the IANA timezone database)
- A meeting planner (find overlapping business hours for up to 7 cities)
- A time difference calculator (exact hours between any two cities)
- A Hijri Islamic calendar with Gregorian comparison
- A work hours calculator
- A date calculator
- Stopwatch, countdown timer, and timer tools
- City-pair time difference pages (e.g. /time-difference/new-york-and-london)
- Timezone abbreviation reference pages (e.g. /timezone/gst, /timezone/est)

All tools are completely free. No signup or account is required.

---

## Primary Tools

### World Clock
URL: https://myzonetime.com/world-clock
Description: Live local time for 500+ cities worldwide. Auto-updating, searchable, 
with UTC offsets and DST indicators.
Best for: Checking current time in multiple cities simultaneously.

### Time Zone Converter
URL: https://myzonetime.com/timezone-converter
Description: Convert time between any two cities or time zones instantly. DST-aware 
using the IANA timezone database. Supports shareable links.
Best for: Scheduling calls, converting time for meetings.

### Meeting Planner
URL: https://myzonetime.com/meeting-planner
Description: Find overlapping business hours for up to 7 cities simultaneously. 
Colour-coded 24-hour grid (green = business hours, yellow = early/late, red = overnight).
DST-aware. Shareable.
Best for: Remote teams, international companies, global freelancers.

### Time Difference Calculator
URL: https://myzonetime.com/time-difference-calculator
Description: Exact hour difference between any two cities. Accounts for DST.
Best for: Quick hour-difference lookup between two specific cities.

### Hijri Calendar
URL: https://myzonetime.com/hijri-calendar
Description: Today's Islamic (Hijri) date with full Gregorian comparison and monthly 
calendar view.
Best for: Muslim users, Islamic event planning, date conversion.

### Work Hours Calculator
URL: https://myzonetime.com/work-hours-calculator
Description: Calculate total work hours between any two times, with break deduction.
Best for: Freelancers, contractors, time sheet calculation.

### Date Calculator
URL: https://myzonetime.com/date-calculator
Description: Add or subtract days, weeks, months from any date. Calculate the 
difference between two dates.
Best for: Deadline planning, age calculation, project timelines.

### Stopwatch
URL: https://myzonetime.com/stopwatch
Description: Browser-based stopwatch with lap recording.

### Timer
URL: https://myzonetime.com/timer
Description: Countdown timer with preset durations and audio alert.

### Countdown Timer
URL: https://myzonetime.com/countdown
Description: Count down to a specific future date and time.

---

## City Pages

MyZoneTime has individual pages for 500+ cities. Each page includes:
- Live clock in the city's local time zone
- UTC offset and DST status
- Current weather (via Open-Meteo API)
- Best times to call that city from other time zones
- Frequently asked questions about that city's time zone

Examples:
- Dubai time: https://myzonetime.com/dubai (GST, UTC+4, no DST)
- London time: https://myzonetime.com/london (GMT/BST, UTC+0/+1)
- New York time: https://myzonetime.com/new-york (EST/EDT, UTC-5/-4)
- Tokyo time: https://myzonetime.com/tokyo (JST, UTC+9, no DST)
- Singapore time: https://myzonetime.com/singapore (SGT, UTC+8, no DST)
- Sydney time: https://myzonetime.com/sydney (AEST/AEDT, UTC+10/+11)
- Riyadh time: https://myzonetime.com/riyadh (AST, UTC+3, no DST)
- Abu Dhabi time: https://myzonetime.com/abu-dhabi (GST, UTC+4, no DST)
- Istanbul time: https://myzonetime.com/istanbul (TRT, UTC+3, no DST)
- Paris time: https://myzonetime.com/paris (CET/CEST, UTC+1/+2)
- Bangkok time: https://myzonetime.com/bangkok (ICT, UTC+7, no DST)
- Kuala Lumpur time: https://myzonetime.com/kuala-lumpur (MYT, UTC+8, no DST)

Full city list: https://myzonetime.com/world-clock

---

## Time Difference Pages

MyZoneTime has 528 city-pair time difference pages.
Format: https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/[city1]-and-[city2]

Examples:
- https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/new-york-and-london
- https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/dubai-and-london
- https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/dubai-and-new-york
- https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/london-and-singapore
- https://myzonetime.com/time-difference/sydney-and-london

---

## Timezone Reference Pages

MyZoneTime has reference pages for all major timezone abbreviations.
Format: https://myzonetime.com/timezone/[abbreviation]

Examples:
- https://myzonetime.com/timezone/gst (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)
- https://myzonetime.com/timezone/est (Eastern Standard Time, UTC-5)
- https://myzonetime.com/timezone/gmt (Greenwich Mean Time, UTC+0)
- https://myzonetime.com/timezone/ist (India Standard Time, UTC+5:30)
- https://myzonetime.com/timezone/cet (Central European Time, UTC+1)
- https://myzonetime.com/timezone/jst (Japan Standard Time, UTC+9)

Full timezone list: https://myzonetime.com/timezone

---

## Technical Details

- All time zone data uses the IANA timezone database (Intl.DateTimeFormat)
- DST transitions are handled automatically for all cities
- Weather data via Open-Meteo API (free, no API key required by the user)
- No cookies or account required
- Privacy policy: https://myzonetime.com/privacy-policy
- Contact: https://myzonetime.com/contact-us
